scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.predev:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env')){console.error('
ERROR: .env not found.
Run: cp .env.example .env and fill in your values.
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev: pnpm install && pnpm run dev:db && pnpm run dev:seed && pnpm run dev:serve
scripts.dev:serve: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently --kill-others -n "api,web" -c "cyan,magenta" "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
